auth.signInPrompt: Sign in to your Kasa account
auth.2faPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or use a backup code.
auth.enter2faCode: Enter your 6-digit code or a backup code.
welcome.hero.title: Membership books built for kehilla treasurers
welcome.hero.subtitle: Stop reconciling dues by age bracket, bar mitzvah funds, and chasuna charges across spreadsheets. Run statement months on the Hebrew calendar, email each family their balance, and know your yearly P&L — without becoming a part-time accountant.
welcome.earlyAccess: Kasa is invitation-only while we're in early access.
welcome.outcomes.heading: What treasurers get back
welcome.outcomes.spreadsheet.title: Replace the treasurer's spreadsheet
welcome.outcomes.spreadsheet.body: Families, dues tiers, payments, and lifecycle events in one place — no more copying rows between workbooks or fixing broken formulas before statement month.
welcome.outcomes.statements.title: Automated statement months
welcome.outcomes.statements.body: Run your statement cycle, charge saved cards, and email PDF statements to each family. Statement month follows the Hebrew calendar, not just Gregorian.
welcome.outcomes.balance.title: Yearly balance at a glance
welcome.outcomes.balance.body: See cycle balances, per-family history, and yearly P&L without exporting to Excel. Know where the kehilla stands before the board asks.
welcome.differentiators.heading: Built the way your kehilla works
welcome.differentiators.rtl.title: Hebrew & Yiddish, RTL-ready
welcome.differentiators.rtl.body: Statements, labels, and Kevittel in Hebrew or Yiddish with right-to-left layout — not bolted-on translations.
welcome.differentiators.plans.title: Your plans and event types
welcome.differentiators.plans.body: Configure payment plans by age bracket, define lifecycle events — bar mitzvah fund, chasuna, Kevittel — and let Kasa track what each family owes.
welcome.differentiators.receipts.title: Kevittel, tax receipts, audit trail
welcome.differentiators.receipts.body: Print Kevittel for donations, generate tax receipts, and keep an auditable log of every change treasurers make.
welcome.billing.title: How billing works
welcome.billing.body: Your Kasa subscription pays for the workspace — users, families, and features for your kehilla. When you charge members' saved cards for dues or events, those payments go to your organization. Member charges are separate from your Kasa bill.
welcome.cta.title: Ready to retire the membership spreadsheet?
welcome.cta.subtitle: Tell us about your kehilla and we'll send an invitation.
signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Get started with Kasa — you'll get your own private workspace.
signup.reason.missingCode: Signing up is invitation-only. Please use the link from your invitation email.
signup.reason.notFound: This invitation code is not recognized. Please use the link from your invitation email.
signup.reason.used: This invitation has already been used. If you already created an account, please sign in.

setup.title: Set up your organization
setup.subtitle: A few quick steps before you dive in.
setup.step1.title: Confirm your organization name
setup.step1.subtitle: This is how your workspace will appear to your team.
setup.step2.title: Configure the basics
setup.step2.subtitle: Create your first payment plan and lifecycle event type. You can change these later in Settings.
setup.step3.title: Connect email
setup.step3.subtitle: Send statements and receipts from your own Gmail account.
setup.smtpPasswordHint: Use a Google App Password — not your regular Gmail password.
setup.skipEmailConfirm: You can configure email later in Settings. Families won't receive automated emails until you do. Skip anyway?
setup.emailSkipWarning: Without email configured, statements and receipts won't be sent automatically.
setup.validation.orgNameMin: Organization name must be at least 2 characters
setup.validation.planNameMin: Plan name must be at least 2 characters
setup.validation.eventNameMin: Event name must be at least 2 characters
setup.validation.priceMin: Amount must be zero or greater
pricing.hero.title: Simple pricing for every kehilla
pricing.hero.subtitle: Pay Kasa for the workspace your kehilla needs. Member card charges for dues, bar mitzvah funds, and events go to your organization — not to Kasa.
pricing.ownerOnly: Only the organization owner can start a subscription. Ask your owner or switch to your own workspace.
pricing.planUnavailable: This plan is not available for online checkout yet.

calculations.title: Yearly Calculations
calculations.subtitle: Actual payments received, lifecycle expenses, and net balance for each year.
calculations.howIntro: Yearly snapshots use the formulas in
calculations.howCashNote: Headline numbers reflect actual cash, not expected plan dues.
calculations.formula.paymentsReceivedDes: Sum of net payments recorded for the year (payment year or payment date), refunds included.
calculations.formula.calculatedExpensesD: Lifecycle event payments for the year plus any manual extra expense (totalExpenses + extraExpense).
calculations.formula.expectedDuesDesc: Current roster × each plan's yearly price — not a historical snapshot. Compare against payments received; do not treat as billed revenue for past years.
calculations.loadError.title: Couldn't load calculations
calculations.loadError.description: Check your connection and try again.
calculations.empty.title: No calculations yet
calculations.empty.description: Refresh a year's totals from the latest payments, lifecycle events, and plan roster.
calculations.summary.footnote: Totals use actual payments recorded for each year. Click Calculate Year to refresh a snapshot after new payments or lifecycle events.
calculations.detail.paymentsNote: Based on payments recorded for {year} (payment year or payment date).
calculations.detail.expectedDuesTooltip: Based on today's roster — not a historical snapshot.
calculations.detail.noPlans: No families are on a payment plan yet.
calculations.detail.expectedFootnote: Uses today's family roster — not historical. Compare against payments received above.
calculations.detail.noEvents: No lifecycle event types configured for this year.
calculations.modal.title: Calculate Year
calculations.modal.description: Refresh payments received, expenses, and net balance for a given year.

reports.generate.title: Generate P&L Report
reports.error.dateRange: Please select both start and end dates
reports.results.title: Report Results
reports.empty.title: No transactions
reports.empty.description: No transactions match the selected period.
projections.title: Dues calculator
projections.subtitle: {horizon}-year break-even projection. Each year shows how many payers you'll have and what each must pay to cover expected event expenses.
projections.error.title: Failed to load the projection.
projections.table.duesTooltip: Planning estimate — assumes flat event costs and linear growth.
projections.how.recommendedDuesFormula: expected event expenses ÷ total payers that year
projections.how.expectedExpensesDesc: — for each lifecycle event, the average historical count per year times the event's current cost, summed. Constant across all forecast years (no inflation).
projections.how.growthNote: growing each year by the historical average:
projections.how.noBmNote: Your organization doesn't auto-assign a plan to bar-mitzvah-aged males, so only families count as payers. To enable that, configure "Bar Mitzvah auto-assign plan" on the organization settings.
projections.how.noEvents: No lifecycle events configured. Add some on
